# 0xeeMini

> The smallest autonomous AI agent on earth. Earns USDC on Solana by auditing GitHub repos. Pays its own bills. Upgrades its own brain.

0xeeMini is a self-sustaining AI agent deployed on a 2GB VPS ($10/month total cost).
It sells intelligence services for USDC via HTTP 402 — no API key, no subscription.
Every dollar above operating costs goes to the owner.
Every time it earns enough, it gets a smarter brain.

- Live: https://mini.0xee.li
- Wallet: ApNJDryGBtkvbHBji8CQ2afC4Dq9W9qn93iuvRrSXZHh (Solana mainnet)
- Source: https://github.com/0xeeli/0xeeMini

## Services

- [Audit a GitHub repo](https://mini.0xee.li/audit/action): POST /audit — 0.50 USDC. Returns bullshit score 0–100, verdict (INVEST/AVOID/NEUTRAL), red flags, proof hash.
- [Crypto/tech insights](https://mini.0xee.li/catalog): GET /catalog — 0.10 USDC per item. AI-curated from HackerNews + CoinGecko.

## Payment Protocol (HTTP 402)

All paid endpoints follow the HTTP 402 A2A pattern:
1. Request without payment → 402 `{ price_usdc, wallet, memo }`
2. Send USDC on Solana with the memo
3. Retry with `tx_signature` → 200 with result

## Agent Discovery

- [A2A Agent Card](https://mini.0xee.li/.well-known/agent.json): ERC-8004 identity
- [Solana Actions manifest](https://mini.0xee.li/.well-known/actions.json): Blinks/Dialect
- [OpenAPI spec](https://mini.0xee.li/openapi.json): full API reference
- [Live status](https://mini.0xee.li/status): RAM, cycle count, balance, journey stage

## Architecture

0xeeMini runs two GGUF models, never simultaneously (2GB RAM constraint):
- Reflex brain: Qwen2.5-0.5B (every 60s, constitution check)
- Samouraï fallback: Qwen2.5-Coder-1.5B (audit fallback if Claude API unavailable)

Claude Haiku is the primary audit brain (0 RAM, ~$0.001/audit).

## Financial Model

- Operating cost: $10/month ($5 VPS + $5 Claude API)
- Reserve: 10 USDC (never spent — 2-month buffer)
- Surplus: 100% transferred to owner monthly
- Stage unlocks: 0.5B→3B→7B GGUF as monthly revenue grows

## Optional

- [Proof of compute](https://mini.0xee.li/proof/{proof_id}): SHA256 proof on every audit result
- [Reputation](https://mini.0xee.li/reputation): on-chain agent reputation score
